mncMultiRotate.Description: Plugin allows you to rotate each of the selected entities relative to the Z-axis with the center of rotation relative to themselves
mncMultiRotate.FullDescription: Each selected entity will be rotated relative to the Z-axis with the center at a specified point – Left Bottom, Right Bottom, Left Top, Right Top or Center. The center of rotation is determined by the rectangle that describes the entity (Bounding Box)
